worktree.setup:
git submodule update --init --recursive
python3 -m venv .venv
. .venv/bin/activate
pip install -e '.[dev]'
npm ci --prefix frontend
mkdir -p local-data/dumps
cp "$PASEO_SOURCE_CHECKOUT_PATH/local-data/dumps/dev_latest.dump" local-data/dumps/dev_latest.dump 2>/dev/null || true
mkdir -p .ssh
cp "$PASEO_SOURCE_CHECKOUT_PATH/.agents/skills/m3tacron/ssh_key" .ssh/ssh_key 2>/dev/null || true
chmod 600 .ssh/ssh_key 2>/dev/null || true
worktree.teardown:
bash scripts/local_dev/up.sh --stop 2>/dev/null || true
rm -rf .venv frontend/node_modules .pytest_cache local-data .ssh

backend.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up --build --abort-on-container-exit postgres db-seed backend
